title: Campingaz 3-Season Sleeping Bag — Comfort Down to -5°C
short_description: Versatile sleeping bag for spring, summer, and autumn. Comfortable down to -5°C, machine washable, and includes a compression sack.
long_description: The Campingaz 3-Season Sleeping Bag is the perfect companion from spring to autumn. With a comfort temperature of -5°C, it keeps you warm on chilly nights. The durable outer fabric and soft inner lining ensure maximum sleeping comfort. It is machine washable and can be conveniently stored in the included compression sack.
buying_angle: Ideal for campers who value practical features in sleeping bags: 3-season use, comfort down to -5°C, machine washable.
